message:
fix(test): update schema_version assertion to use CARGO_PKG_VERSION

The cli_model_validation test still hard-coded "1.0.0" for the
schema_version field, but commit 12a6401 changed the production
code to use env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION"). Updates the test to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
